# Tasks.InvalidParamsCode field

The §22 error code a server returns to `tasks/get` / `tasks/update` / `tasks/cancel` for a `taskId` that is unknown — never existed, or expired and removed: `-32602` Invalid params (§25.7, §25.11, R-25.7-r, R-25.8-m, R-25.9-g, R-25.11-d).
